raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies some prior work (CMIP5, IPCC AR5) but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (2024 U.S. National Climate Assessment) and notes the absence of CMIP6 and IPCC AR6 references, but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 6.2% compute reduction, 0.08 °C mean absolute deviation), but not all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stays within the agreed scope with one drift (the discussion of CMIP5 vs CMIP6).",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies some potential downstream-harm risks (e.g., underdisclosed surrogate error, unexamined router confidence calibration), but does not fully address them.",
    "RX.5": "The output blends sources without clear traceability (e.g., no explicit citations for prior ML-emulator and multi-fidelity work)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies some prior work (CMIP5, IPCC AR5) but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (2024 U.S. National Climate Assessment) and notes the absence of CMIP6 and IPCC AR6 references, but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for some claims (e.g., 6.2% compute reduction, 0.08 °C mean absolute deviation), but not all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within the agreed scope with one drift (the discussion of CMIP5 vs CMIP6).
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies some potential downstream-harm risks (e.g., underdisclosed surrogate error, unexamined router confidence calibration), but does not fully address them.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without clear traceability (e.g., no explicit citations for prior ML-emulator and multi-fidelity work).
